posts.author: Mbarara Fresh Hub
posts.text: Fresh tomatoes available in Mbarara. Delivery to Kampala and surrounding districts. DM for wholesale pricing and farm gate pickup.

posts.author: Glow Salon Kampala
posts.text: We have opened a new premium salon in Nsambya. Grand opening discounts on haircuts, styling, and beauty services this week.

messages.text: Anyone know the best time to plant maize in Jinja?
Usually start of March rains. Make sure soil is warm enough!
